title: How a Godly Man Stays Steady When Everyone Around Him Gets Engaged
caption:
Every engagement post you see is missing the four years of loneliness, waiting, and prayer that got him there. You're comparing your whole story to someone else's highlight.

Nobody's proposing to potential. Keep building the man who can actually carry a family. A quiet season isn't God forgetting you, it's Him building something in you that only gets built in the waiting.

You can want a wife and still not need one to be okay today.

#faith #singleness #christianman #patience #godlyman
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
